summary: 30+ comprehensive tests for dashboardModel covering date navigation, filtering, cursor/scroll behavior, expand/collapse state, text wrapping, and visual rendering
notes: Tests dashboard.go sub-model. Coverage: 1) Date nav (◄/► key, LoadSummariesMsg generation), 2) Filtering (f-key cycle through source types: empty→telegram→rss→reddit→hackernews), 3) Cursor navigation (Up/Down clamp at bounds, reset on load), 4) Expand/collapse (Enter/l/e/c keys, state resets on load), 5) Scroll-to-cursor logic (keeps cursor visible), 6) Text wrapping with ANSI-aware width, 7) Rendering: collapsed cards show ▸, expanded show ▾, source badges, message counts. Key fixtures: makeSummaries(). Tests interactive filter overlay presence.
